CommunityApplications.Profile: HotFetched is a self-hosted 3D printer firmware workshop in a single Docker container. Pick a motherboard (45 boards across BigTreeTech, Creality, FYSETC, Makerbase, Mellow, Ultimachine, LDO Motors and generic RAMPS), then build Marlin or Klipper from GitHub or a ZIP, or generate a RepRapFirmware config.g and fetch the matching prebuilt binary. Edit the full configuration through a web UI - drivers, kinematics, sensorless homing, TMC currents, bed levelling, PID, input shaping, multi-material units, probes, displays, boot images and startup sounds - then run confidence-gated builds where 100% means the firmware actually compiled. Exports firmware.bin / klipper.bin / klipper.uf2 plus ready-to-flash config bundles. For help, open an issue on the GitHub repository linked below.
